mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, title AS title, category AS category, source AS source, content AS content, keywords AS keywords, priority AS priority, enabled AS enabled, gmt_create AS gmtCreate, gmt_modified AS gmtModified FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority DESC, gmt_create DESC

SELECT id AS id, title AS title, category AS category, source AS source, content AS content, keywords AS keywords, priority AS priority, enabled AS enabled, gmt_create AS gmtCreate, gmt_modified AS gmtModified FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk ( id, title, category, source, content, keywords, priority, enabled, gmt_create, gmt_modified ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{category}, #{source}, #{content}, #{keywords}, #{priority}, #{enabled}, #{gmtCreate}, #{gmtModified} )
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_chunk SET title = #{title}, category = #{category}, source = #{source}, content = #{content}, keywords = #{keywords}, priority = #{priority}, enabled = #{enabled}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified} WHERE id = #{id}
